title: hebe laevis
intro: Hebe laevis, also known as the Smooth Hebe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin irritations. Hebe laevis has been traditionally used to promote digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, offering a range of health benefits. Herbal preparations of Hebe laevis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
